name: Export eBay Listing Data
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We recommend using both Google Sheets, and Microsoft Excel to complete these steps."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "eBay", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "View Listings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set your filters to only show the listings that you would want to export. In this example, the filters have been set to show "}, {"text": "Ended", "bold": true}, {"text": " listings."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image1]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click and drag to highlight all the listings that are returned, and copy them to your clipboard."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image2]"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": It\u2019s important that the area you copy covers the whole table, from the top left to bottom right corner as indicated with the arrows."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Paste this information into "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/", "children": [{"text": "Google Sheets"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image3]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You now need to remove the formatting of the table. Select the table, and go to "}, {"text": "Format", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Clear Formatting", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image4]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Copy the data, and paste it into Microsoft Excel."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image5]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select the table and right click, then choose "}, {"text": "Remove Hyperlinks", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image6]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now delete any unnecessary columns, such as "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Fee", "bold": true}, {"text": ", "}, {"text": "Listed On", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and "}, {"text": "Status", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To do this, right click on a column header and select "}, {"text": "Delete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image7]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To change the "}, {"text": "Information", "bold": true}, {"text": " field so that it only shows the quantity, you need to use the find & replace function. Hold down "}, {"text": "Ctrl", "bold": true}, {"text": " and press "}, {"text": "H", "bold": true}, {"text": ". In the find box, type in "}, {"text": "*Available:", "code": true}, {"text": ". Leave the replace field blank and click "}, {"text": "Replace All", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image8]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "With the replace box still open, type "}, {"text": "Out*", "code": true}, {"text": " in the find field and click "}, {"text": "Replace All", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image9]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "With the replace box still open, in the find field hold "}, {"text": "Ctrl", "bold": true}, {"text": " and press "}, {"text": "J", "bold": true}, {"text": ". You\u2019ll see a small dot in the find field but nothing else. Click "}, {"text": "Replace All", "bold": true}, {"text": " and any line breaks will be removed."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image10]"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Data to be extracted"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "1st Replace"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "2nd Replace"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Label"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "*Custom Label:", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Ctrl + J"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Title"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Fixed Price Item Variations", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Custom Label:*", "code": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Price"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "$", "code": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\u00a0"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-1e687e37"}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "All that\u2019s left in the field will be the quantity. You can now perform similar steps on the "}, {"text": "Item", "bold": true}, {"text": " field depending on what data you want to extract."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": " your spreadsheet as a CSV file (MS-DOS), and you can use it to import into Neto."}]}]}]}]
